name: Marshall Field's Cinnamon Crunch Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and margarine until light and fluffy. Add the sugar and blend in the eggs.
3. Combine sour cream with baking soda in a separate bowl. Set aside.
4. Sift cake flour, salt, baking powder, and nutmeg together.
5. Gradually add the sifted mixture to the butter mixture, mixing until just combined. Do not overmix.
6. In another large bowl, combine the crunch mix ingredients using a pastry blender and mix well.
7. Fold in half a cup of the crunch mix with the muffin mix.
8. Spoon batter into paper-lined muffin tins, filling each about halfway full.
9. Sprinkle remaining crunch mix over the top of each muffin.
10. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Makes 12 muffins.
